name: Poppin' Fresh Barbe Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 8-oz tube of store bought biscuits or your favorite 12 biscuit.
2. Use store bought sauce or your favorite recipe.
3. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain off excess fat.
4. Add the barbecue sauce, onion, and brown sugar to the skillet; stir until combined.
5. Separate biscuit dough into 12 pieces. Place one in each of 12 ungreased muffin cups.
6. Press the dough up the sides of the cups to form a shell.
7. Spoon the meat mixture into the cups and sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12 minutes. Serve hot.
VARIATIONS:
Use 1 13-oz can of chili beans or baked beans in place of the ground beef, along with frankfurters or hot dogs cut into pieces.
Add green bell pepper or a hot pepper to the recipe for extra flavor.
